diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,180 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: HonoFactory, MiddlewareFactory, FactoryType, defineHono, defineMiddleware
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../types, ../../utils/http-status, ../../utils/cookie, src/helper/dev/index.ts, src/helper/route/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Core factory helper creating hono apps and middleware. 9019 bytes.
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: Route, Routes, RouteHandler, RouteHandlerFactory, RouteType
+- Reads as: ../../context, **
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/route/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Route helper defining request handlers by path. 4397 bytes.
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext, WSEvents, WebSocketHelperDefineContext, WSReadyState
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../types, ../../utils/http-status, ../../utils/stream
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/websocket/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: WebSocket helper for upgrade and message handling. 3677 bytes.
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: GetCookie, GetSignedCookie, setCookie, setSignedCookie, getCookie, getSignedCookie, deleteCookie, Cookie
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../utils/cookie
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/cookie/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Cookie helper for reading signed and unsigned cookies. 4325 bytes.
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: ../../client, ../../context, **
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/testing/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Testing helper creating test client from app. 980 bytes.
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: env, Runtime, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents
+- Reads as: ../../context
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/adapter/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Adapter runtime detection for node, deno, bun, workerd, etc. 2372 bytes.
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: cCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, rawCssString, type ClassNameSlug, type OnInvalidSlug
+- Reads as: ../../helper/html, ../../jsx/constants, ../../jsx/dom/css, './common'
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Safe summary: CSS helper for styled-components-style rendering. 7229 bytes.
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID, CLASS_NAME, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID, STYLE_STRING, SELECTOR, SELECTORS, EXTERNAL_CLASS_NAMES, rawCssString, raw, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, types
+- Reads as: **
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Shared css types and utility functions for class keys. 9924 bytes.
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: ProxyHandler, ProxyHandlerFactory, proxy, redirectProxy, ResponseType
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../http-exception
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/proxy/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Proxy helper for forwarding requests to upstream. 5897 bytes.
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName, RouteData, RouteDataItem
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/color, ../../utils/handler
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/dev/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: Dev helper for displaying app routes. 2233 bytes.
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: raw, html, HtmlEscapedString, HtmlEscapedStringBuffer, HtmlEscapedCallback
+- Reads as: ../../utils/html
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html/index.test.ts
+- Safe summary: HTML escaping and raw string helper. 1891 bytes.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: ssg, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin
+- Reads as: **
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG helper exporting ssg and SSG utilities. 242 bytes.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: ssg, FetchPlugin, FetchResponse, fetchPlugin, ssgFetch, removeFiles, saveFiles, buildIndex, buildIndexFromRoutes, getRouterName

+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG fetch and build for static HTML generation. 14279 bytes.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir, FilterStaticGenerateRouteData, filterStaticGenerateRoutes
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../router, ../../types, ../../utils/handler
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG utility functions for path handling. 2621 bytes.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText, type SSEMessage, SSEStreamingApi, StreamingApi types
+- Reads as: ./stream, ./sse, ./text, **

+

+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../utils/stream
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.test.ts

+
+## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEStreamingApiContext, SSEMessage, run
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../utils/html, ../../utils/stream, ./utils
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/sse.test.ts

+
+## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: streamText, streamTextHandler
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../context/TEXT_PLAIN, ./
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/text.test.ts

+
+## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
+
+- Main exports or names: accepts, Accept, acceptsConfig, acceptsOptions, type AcceptHeader
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../utils/accept,
